SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12

Class Server

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Server
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServerStub, Serializable, Remote
public class Server extends UnicastRemoteObject implements ServerStub
The server that contains all the ongoing matches
See Also:

    Description

    Class constructor

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    closeMatchForAllPlayers(String matchName, String disconnectedPlayer)
    Closes the match for all players in a game, notifying them of the termination
    void
    closeMatchForPlayer(String nickName)
    Close a match for a player, and if the last players leaves, the pointer to that particular match will be eliminated from the map containing that match, and all the links in the match itself are destroyed
    void
    createMatch(String matchName, int numPlayers, String nickname)
    Create a match in the Server
    State
    getGameStateFromNickname(String nickname)
    Returns the state of the game in which a given player is
    void
    getIncompleteLobbies(String nickname)
    Gives to the client the incomplete lobbies that he could join
    List<String>
    getNicknamesInAMatch(String matchName)
    Returns the list of nicknames of the players in a match

    getter for the RMI registry

    Get the VirtualView of a player
    void

    Join a match
    void
    playerDisconnectionHandler(String nickname)
    Handles the disconnection of a player: closes the match in which the player was
    void
    setNickname(String nickname, ClientStub client, ServerSideSocketHandler socketHandler)
    Sets the nickname of the client that calls this remote method or by the socket handler connected to it
    void
    start()
    Starts the server that waits for clients connection

  • Constructor Details

    • Server

      public Server(int portServerSocket, Registry registry) throws RemoteException
      Class constructor
      Parameters:
      portServerSocket - the port of the Socket Connection
      registry - the RMI registry
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed

  • Method Details

    • getVirtuaView

      public VirtualView getVirtuaView(String nickname)
      Get the VirtualView of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player
      Returns:
      the VirtualView of that player

    • setNickname

      public void setNickname(String nickname, ClientStub client, ServerSideSocketHandler socketHandler) throws RemoteException, NotBoundException, AlreadyBoundException, DuplicateNicknameException
      Sets the nickname of the client that calls this remote method or by the socket handler connected to it
      Specified by:
      setNickname in interface ServerStub
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname with whom wants to be identified
      client - An interface that identifies the client in case of an RMI connection
      socketHandler - the server side socket handler of the player with a socket connection who wants to create the match
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed
      NotBoundException - if an attempt is made to look for a name that is not currently bound in the RMI registry
      AlreadyBoundException - if an attempt is made to bind an object to a name that already has an associated binding in the RMI registry.
      DuplicateNicknameException - if there's already a player with that nickname

    • getIncompleteLobbies

      public void getIncompleteLobbies(String nickname) throws NoNicknameException, RemoteException
      Gives to the client the incomplete lobbies that he could join
      Specified by:
      getIncompleteLobbies in interface ServerStub
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the user
      Throws:
      NoNicknameException - if there is no such user with that nickname
      RemoteException

    • createMatch

      public void createMatch(String matchName, int numPlayers, String nickname) throws RemoteException, DuplicateNicknameException, WrongNumberOfPlayersException, DuplicateMatchException, IllegalStateException, InvalidPlacementException, WrongInformationException, NotYourTurnException, InvalidParameterException, InvalidSearchPositionException, NoNicknameException, EmptyDeckException
      Create a match in the Server
      Specified by:
      createMatch in interface ServerStub
      Parameters:
      matchName - A String that identifies the match
      numPlayers - the number of the players of the match
      nickname - A String that identifies the player who wants to create the match
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed
      DuplicateNicknameException - if there's already a player with that nickname
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - if numPlayers is less than 2 or more than 4
      DuplicateMatchException - if there's already a match with that name
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null
      NoNicknameException - if there is no such user with that nickname
      InvalidPlacementException
      WrongInformationException
      NotYourTurnException
      InvalidSearchPositionException
      EmptyDeckException

    • joinMatch

      public void joinMatch(String matchName, String nickname) throws RemoteException, DuplicateNicknameException, NoMatchException, WrongNumberOfPlayersException, IllegalStateException, InvalidPlacementException, WrongInformationException, NotYourTurnException, InvalidParameterException, EmptyDeckException, InvalidSearchPositionException, NoNicknameException
      Join a match
      Specified by:
      joinMatch in interface ServerStub
      Parameters:
      matchName - The name of the match to join
      nickname - A String that identifies the player who wants to join the match
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed
      DuplicateNicknameException - if there's already a player with that nickname
      NoMatchException - if there is not a match with that name
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - if there is already the maximum number of players in the lobby.
      NoNicknameException - if there is no such user with that nickname
      InvalidPlacementException
      WrongInformationException
      NotYourTurnException
      EmptyDeckException
      InvalidSearchPositionException

    • closeMatchForPlayer

      public void closeMatchForPlayer(String nickName) throws NoMatchException, RemoteException
      Close a match for a player, and if the last players leaves, the pointer to that particular match will be eliminated from the map containing that match, and all the links in the match itself are destroyed
      Specified by:
      closeMatchForPlayer in interface ServerStub
      Parameters:
      nickName - A String that identifies the player who wants to leave the match
      Throws:
      NoMatchException - is the player is not part of a match
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the server that waits for clients connection

    • getNicknamesInAMatch

      public List<String> getNicknamesInAMatch(String matchName)
      Returns the list of nicknames of the players in a match
      Parameters:
      matchName - a String identifying the match name
      Returns:
      a List of nicknames

    • closeMatchForAllPlayers

      public void closeMatchForAllPlayers(String matchName, String disconnectedPlayer) throws RemoteException
      Closes the match for all players in a game, notifying them of the termination
      Parameters:
      matchName - a String that identifies the match to close
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed

    • playerDisconnectionHandler

      public void playerDisconnectionHandler(String nickname) throws RemoteException
      Handles the disconnection of a player: closes the match in which the player was
      Specified by:
      playerDisconnectionHandler in interface ServerStub
      Parameters:
      nickname - a String with the nickname of the disconnected player
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed

    • getGameStateFromNickname

      public State getGameStateFromNickname(String nickname)
      Returns the state of the game in which a given player is
      Parameters:
      nickname - a String with the nickname of the player
      Returns:
      the game State if the player is in a match; null otherwise;

    • getRegistry

      public Registry getRegistry()
      getter for the RMI registry
      Returns:
      the RMI registry
